creator: kubito@gmail.com
text:
At Sun, 24 Oct 2010 03:20:47 -0200,
Raphael Kubo da Costa wrote:
> Hmm, actually it seems to have already been reported upstream, even
> though nothing has been done yet:
> 
> https://alioth.debian.org/tracker/index.php?func=detail&aid=312691&group_id=100114&atid=413095

So my comment on the upstream bug report seems to have had some effect
:)

After
http://git.debian.org/?p=bash-completion/bash-completion.git;a=commitdiff;h=7d45595
avahi-browse is queried only if COMP_KNOWN_HOSTS_WITH_AVAHI is set
(the default is unset).

Adam, how about backporting this patch for now and make the port build
again on amd64?
